no_projects_joined: Seems like you haven't joined a project yet. You can try scanning a QR code, or search for a project from here:
project_form_private_warning: By default, your project is set as "private". If your project is private, people won't be able to find it in project search. This option is recommended if you need to experiment with your project before opening it to the public, or if you don't want outsiders to join. You can always change this setting later, but know that private projects require an invitation to join.
task_empty_message: No task here. Try adding a task yourself! But if this problem persists, please let support know.
task_project_empty_message: No task here. Try adding a task to the project yourself! But if this problem persists, please let the support team know.
task_note_empty: No notes were found on this task. If you want to add a note, you can do it here:
task_form_description_placeholder: Go to the garden, and water the plants
task_delete_warning: You're about to delete a task
task_delete_warning_message: Are you sure you want to delete the task "{{task}}"? If you do, participations will be cancelled, and notes removed.
